bio: Hi 👋, my name is Parth and I am currently working at Siren as a Software Engineer. I have been working in the field of Software Engineering for almost 4.5 years now.I achieved First Class Honours 🎖️ in my Master's Degree 🎓 in Information Systems Management (ISM) from the University of Galway 🏛. I have a passion for building software that makes sense in the real world, and now I am also working with AI and Machine Learning.Thanks for taking your time to visit my page. 😁
